textByHashes.a72eb2b7b188d750081b921d6b2bedc8323688c1: How did you get into West Ardougne? Ah well you'll have to stay, can't risk you spreading the plague outside.
textByHashes.01caa567fee229310e99b16cd6ea4456501c49af: You must be nuts, absolutely not!
textByHashes.cb32576a9c8d2f129d150a71334296926b8dd190: Well they're as good as dead then, no point in trying to save them.
textByHashes.3effb20e1aae4b7f9365aecfb875c0cfa83af10b: It's not regulation. Anyway you're not properly trained to deal with the plague.
textByHashes.249cc9d22e86ea8f366205b6e04535a4fd0a21f9: It requires a strict 18 months of training.
textByHashes.423b98f720e3d831297f580c5537a5f47aa460e5: You're wasting my time, I have a lot of work to do!
textByHashes.724127340ba22f0dda80350b2a8f4760abd697c8: We're working for King Lathas of East Ardougne. He has tasked us with containing the accursed plague sweeping West Ardougne.
textByHashes.d77f211afeefa3a6e50ab5a370cc3aac5716869f: We also do our best to ease these people's suffering. We're nicknamed mourners because we spend a lot of time at plague victim funerals, no one else is allowed to risk attending.
textByHashes.bc7bc08262f92f5001e641124ad7152ddb0f9863: It's a demanding job, and we get little thanks from the people here.
textByHashes.7b7893f923e2800f863f9554eb40616032c17c34: Can't risk you being a carrier. That protective clothing you have isn't regulation issue. It won't meet safety standards.
